Index.meta_description: B2B platform for factory waste management and sourcing.

Hero.title: Transforming Industrial Waste into <important>Valuable Resources</important>.
Hero.description: The leading B2B platform for industrial symbiosis. Connect with verified factories and recyclers to buy, sell, and manage industrial by-products sustainably.

Features.section_description: Everything you need to turn industrial waste into wealth and achieve your zero-waste goals.
Features.feature_description: Streamline your factory's waste management and raw material sourcing with our intelligent platform.

Pricing.section_title: Simple Plans for Every Factory Scale
Pricing.section_description: Choose the perfect plan to manage your industrial symbiosis operations efficiently.

FAQ.step1_desc: Factories list their industrial by-products with detailed specifications. Our system categorizes materials to prepare them for the perfect match.
FAQ.step2_desc: Our AI engine analyzes location, capacity, and material compatibility to find the most efficient symbiotic partners.
FAQ.step3_desc: Connect with verified partners through our integrated chat system to discuss logistics and quality control.
FAQ.step4_desc: Secure your connection and receive contact credentials while tracking your environmental contribution.

CTA.title: Ready to achieve zero waste?
CTA.description: Join hundreds of factories already benefiting from industrial symbiosis and reducing their carbon footprint.

ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to access this factory data.

SignIn.meta_description: Access your factory dashboard and manage your materials.

SignUp.meta_description: Register your factory and join the circular economy network.

Dashboard.meta_description: Manage your factory waste and sourcing efficiently.

DashboardIndex.title_bar_description: Welcome back to your factory dashboard.
DashboardIndex.message_state_description: Start managing your industrial symbiosis operations.
DashboardIndex.message_state_alternative: Need help getting started? Check out our quick guide.
